claim_text: Maintain soil water above 50% depletion from jointing onward

value.raw_value_text: As the wheat approaches jointing, soil water availability should not be allowed to deplete to less than 50 percent available throughout the remainder of the growing season.

geo_evidence.source_location_text:
Wheat Production Handbook K-State Research & Extension Manhattan, Kansas1

Growth and Development Gary M. Paulsen, Crop Research Physiologist, Agronomy 2 Varieties Rollin G. Sears, Wheat Breed
